title: Clinical Data Exfiltration via Bulk Record Export
dataSources:
**Index:** `ehr` (PHI-restricted).
 **Sourcetypes:** `epic:audit` (hyperspace Reporting / Clarity-style export of print & export actions) and `cerner:audit` (**DB Connect** hourly extract of **mass report / print / CCL export** tables). **Mechanism:** Chronicles file drops or Epic integration **syslog app** + **Cerner Oracle** JDBC same as UC-10.12.55 foundational pipeline; this UC adds **field-level filters for `action IN ("export","print","report_run")`** (normalise vendor verbs: `PrintedReport`, `RanReport`, `ReportRequest`).
 **Key fields:** `record_count` ( rows or pages returned—validate vendor semantics: some count **images** not patients); **`report_name`** / `REPORT_ID`; **`export_format`** (`PDF`, `CSV`, **`CD-ROM` archive** placeholders); **`user_id`, `user_name`**; **`mrn`** multiplicity per job; **`workstation_id`** optional.
 **Volume:** materially lower than generic views—typically **≈15k–120k flagged-class events/day** in large IDNs; bursts at month-end payer cycles.
 **CIM:** Custom—do not blindly map to Alerts without diluting fidelity.
app:
**Same foundational stack as MRN anomaly UC:** Splunk UF / HF inputs for Epic exports; **`splunk_app_db_connect`** on heavy forwarders with JDBC to Cerner **`AUD` / Reporting schema** slices limited to bulk operations service account.
 Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud **9.2+** under BAA.**Install references:** `$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/splunk_app_db_connect/local/inputs.conf` DB input stanzas; Epic integration host `inputs.conf [splunktcp-ssl]` segment.
spl:
index=ehr sourcetype IN ("epic:audit","cerner:audit") action IN ("export","print","report_run")
| stats count as export_events sum(record_count) as total_records dc(mrn) as unique_patients by user_id user_name action
| where total_records > 500 OR unique_patients > 100
| sort - total_records
description: Aggregates audited export-like actions per user—including total rows moved, repeating job counts, and breadth of affected patients—to reveal bulk withdrawals that stray from bedside single-chart workflows.
value: Security and integrity teams can intervene before spreadsheets of protected health information linger on unrecognized laptops or cloud drives, shortening breach-notification windows and safeguarding research agreements that limit reuse.
implementation: Ensure audits capture `record_count`, `mrn`, and fine-grained `action` classifications from each vendor connector. Populate `record_count` with authoritative numbers from APIs instead of brittle log scraping when possible. Integrate exclusions for sanctioned reporting service accounts keyed on `user_id`.
visualization: **Layout:** (1) **Panel A — “Top bulk movers bar”** — `total_records` stacked by `export_format`. (2) **Panel B — “Breadth bubble”** — Bubble chart `export_events` (x) vs `unique_patients` (y); bubble size=`total_records`; color=`action`. (3) **Panel C — “User drill table”** — Sortable forensic table splitting `user_name`, `report_name`, aggregates. (4) **Panel D — “Timeline replay”** — Timechart stacking bulk operations per hour for situational surge detection.
dataModelAcceleration: Not applicable: detection depends on longitudinal patient identifiers within vendor audit feeds.

references.title: Splunk Lantern — Use Case Explorer: Healthcare
HHS HIPAA Security Rule — Information access management
HHS HIPAA for Professionals — Privacy Rule overview

knownFalsePositives: (1) **Regulatory attestations packs** assembling thousands of discrete records for CMS / payer. *Mitigation:* tag ROI service accounts (`authorized_bulk_accounts.csv`) lifting thresholds with quarterly attestation CSV owner sign-off. (2) **IRB-approved research extracts** nightly de-identified subsets still logged as PHI export at source layer. *Mitigation:* ingest research purpose code from Epic `ResearchStudyId` correlate allowlist macro. (3) **Disaster preparedness printing ward manifests** bursts `print`. *Mitigation:* emergency operations flag analogous to UC-55 mass casualty overlays. (4) **Mis-attributed robotic ETL replay** under clinician username due to SSO mapping bug duplicates patient breadth. *Mitigation:* corroborate workstation vs known VDI robotic sessions from AD group `CN=ETL-Service`. (5) **Large `record_count` but single patient Oncology longitudinal PDF** benign. *Mitigation:* augment alerting with **`dc(mrn)` / `unique_patients` ratio** emphasis already partially present — emphasise divergence cases in review SOP. (6) **Vendor patch duplicates events** multiplying counts. *Mitigation:* dedupe on `CorrelationGuid` ingest key if supplied.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• **Authorized bulk extractor registry** jointly owned by Compliance + IR + Privacy with contract renewal dates embedded in KV `bulk_export_accounts`.
• **Verified `record_count` semantics workbook** distinguishing row vs page counts per vendor connector—mandatory CFO sign-down if used for punitive metrics.
• **Immutable raw vendor archive indices** retained **7y** aligning records retention—not search tier.
• **Legal hold procedure** delaying automated deletion triggers when litigation flag present.
• **SOC playbooks harmonised with breach assessment** RACI referencing HHS OCR factors.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Extend UC-55 plumbing: Epic export feed must classify **printing classes** distinctly from standard **Hyperspace view** telemetry—often separate integration channel & sourcetype `epic:audit` ingest path.
**props.conf**** ensure:
```ini
[cerner:audit]
EVAL-action = lower(coalesce(PRINTACTION, EXPORTACTION,"unknown"))
EVAL-record_count = coalesce(RECS_RETURNED,num_rows_extracted,"0")
```
**DB Connect tuning:** Add partial index-aware SQL filter `ACTION IN ('PRINT','EXPORT','REP_RUN')` at source to minimise JDBC payload CPU on Cerner RAC.
**Field extraction for `report_name`:** Prefer stable ID keyed lookup `clinical_reports_inventory.csv` enriching human readable short name for analyst clarity without dumping full parameter blobs into Splunk unnecessarily.
**Verification SPL:** Compare top 15 users **`sum(record_count)`** aggregated day vs vendor **Report Activity** dashboard KPI within 10% drift tolerance.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
```spl
index=ehr sourcetype IN ("epic:audit","cerner:audit") action IN ("export","print","report_run")
| stats count as export_events sum(record_count) as total_records dc(mrn) as unique_patients by user_id user_name action
| where total_records > 500 OR unique_patients > 100
| sort - total_records
```

Understanding this SPL
• **Action whitelist** confines to egress-prone modalities only—omit routine viewing noise.
• **`stats` multi-operator** merges event frequency (**count** proxy for repeated job attempts) alongside cumulative record volume (**sum record_count**) and patient breadth (**dc mrn**)—triangulating reckless export vs benign large single-patient dossier scenarios.
• **Threshold OR** purposely inclusive: large row pull even if narrower patient cardinality (tabular duplicate lines) stays suspicious; converse wide **`unique_patients`** moderate row tally indicates reconnaissance roaming.
• **`sort - total_records`** orders worst quantitative exposure first aiding triage SLA.

Schedule as Alert: cron **`42 */8 * * *`** (three times daily) latency-friendly; timeframe ** `-32h@-8h`** overlapped ingestion safety; escalate **high** tier when **both thresholds** breached simultaneously in rolling 24h pre-joined subsearch verifying absence of **`authorized_bulk`** flag.

Step 3 — Validate
(a) Pull five maximal rows replay vendor detailed transcript export hash.
(b) Validate **`record_count` not inflated by logging duplicates** counting lines vs clinical rows (`dedup` correlation sample).
(c) Correlate workstation DLP egress events if enrichment exists cautiously—not blocking PHI.
(d) Supervisor attestation ticketing optional integration keyed `user_manager_email` lookup.
(e) PHI minimisation QA—confirm dashboard panels mask `mrn` display default.
(f) Quarterly threshold sensitivity sweep ROC-styled backlog review Privacy Committee minutes.

Step 4 — Operationalize
**Dashboard:** Quartet layout referencing `visualization`.
**Alerting:** Swim lane to **SOC + Privacy dual** acknowledgement within 60 minutes business hours.**ServiceNow correlation** merges duplicate actions same job GUID.
**Runbook numbered:** 1) Freeze AD account? only if imminent exfil corroborates—coordinate CISO discretion. 2) Notify Privacy Officer pager after-hours breaches >1000 cumulative rows heuristic. 3) Preserve `_raw` events snapshot index archival. 4) Interview user within 72h HIPAA policy target if malicious unlikely path. 5) Update authorized registry if sanctioned job.

Step 5 — Troubleshooting
• **Stale `unique_patients` field** absent on print classes—rely temporarily on **`total_records` until the parser fix ships.
• **Epic Hyperspace version upgrade renames verbs** empties SPL filter—maintain synonyms lookup externalised macro list.
• **DB Connect failover pair double-count rows** reconcile via `_CD` metadata host field distinct.
• **Large educational slide deck mistaken as export** benign—whitelist file extension heuristic optional.
• **Unicode report names breaking kv extraction** rectify `LINE_BREAKER` for multiline events.
• **Alert fatigue cyclic month-end payroll interface** suppressed via dynamic calendar macro.
• **Insufficient disk hot partition** ingestion gap causes under-detection spike later—infra monitor forwarder checkpoints.
grandmaExplanation: We watch for unusually large grabs of sensitive patient paperwork—printing, spreadsheets, monster reports—all at once. Early notice helps guardians step in before private details scatter where they shouldn't.
